# The Growth Marketing Guide for Mobile Gaming - Iterable

## The Growth Marketing Guide for Mobile Gaming

We analyzed the push messaging strategies of the top 100 freemium mobile games in the U.S. to study how they communicate with their users.

We note how and when pushes were sent, as well as how push strategy varied by game genre.

**Here’s what you’ll find inside:**

*   Insightful statistics about the country’s top grossing mobile games
*   Case studies with real-life examples of gaming push notifications
*   Recommendations on how to make your pushes stand out
